captain_ranking.name: Bowen
captain_ranking.notes: WHU vs Leeds relegation decider — highest-motivation, highest-intensity fixture in GW38. Home, confirmed full 90, West Ham's primary creative + goal threat (on pens/set pieces). Strong floor from secure minutes plus a genuine boom ceiling in a must-win. Best floor-weighted EV in the squad. Already the armband.

captain_ranking.name: M.Salah
captain_ranking.notes: Highest individual ceiling of any owned asset and premium-class floor even on an off day. Confirmed LIV starter (final Liverpool appearance) with personal Golden Boot incentive. Docked for away fixture (fdr=3) and reduced team motivation if title already secured. Marginally behind Bowen on floor due to venue/stakes; clear vice.

captain_ranking.name: Mbeumo
captain_ranking.notes: Confirmed nailed starter, strong recent form, favourable home fixture (fdr=2), zero rotation risk. Reliable attacking returner with consistent minutes — solid floor, respectable ceiling. Third-best EV but trails the two premiums on ceiling.

captain_ranking.name: Wood
captain_ranking.notes: NFO home vs BOU (fdr=2), confirmed starter, reliable physical scorer. Dead-rubber context lowers intensity and caps ceiling, but minutes are secure giving a dependable floor. Good consistency play with modest upside.

captain_ranking.name: Rogers
captain_ranking.notes: AVL home (fdr=2) with possible European-qualification motivation. Regular starter, mid-price upside. Lower floor than the premium/forward options given less guaranteed attacking involvement, but the clean fixture keeps EV respectable.

tc_recommendation: do not play — single GW38, no DGW
summary: GW38 floor-weighted EV (APEX: prefer consistent floor over boom-bust) ranks Bowen (C) first — WHU vs Leeds is the highest-motivation, highest-intensity fixture of the gameweek, home, confirmed full 90, with both a dependable floor and a real must-win ceiling. M.Salah (VC) carries the single highest ceiling and premium-class floor but is docked for an away trip (fdr=3) and potentially low team stakes if the title is secured. Mbeumo, Wood, Rogers fill ranks 3-5 on clean fdr=2 fixtures but trail on ceiling. Confirmed zeros (Haaland, Raya, Gabriel) excluded from the pool. TC withheld — single fixture, no DGW means no multiplier value; saving is correct.
